title: lesquerella argyraea subsp. diffusa
intro: Lesquerella argyraea subsp. diffusa is a subspecies of the Lesquerella argyraea plant, commonly known as the diffuse popcorn flower, which is a flowering plant in the mustard family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, and is also believed to have antioxidant properties. Lesquerella argyraea subsp. diffusa can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, teas, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
